english translation text:
Dua “Allahummaqsim lana min khashyatik”
Tofatus Saaemeen p347c/p341c
In this dua, as ask Allah (SWT) to put the fear of his greatness in us so that we not disobey him as our disobedience keeps us away from reaching his pleasure.
In the Name of Allah, the All-merciful, the All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
Oh Allah: (please do) grant us an amount of fearfulness of You
that prevents us from committing acts of disobedience to You;

arabic text: وَمِنْ طَاعَتِكَ مَا تُبَلِّغُنَا بِهِ رِضْوَانَكَ،
english translation text: and an amount of obedience to You that makes us attain Your satisfaction;

arabic text: وَمِنَ الْيَقِينِ مَا يَهُونُ عَلَيْنَا بِهِ مُصِيبَاتُ الدُّنْيَا.
english translation text: and an amount of conviction that help us tolerate the vicissitudes of this worldly life.
Oh Allah: (please do) make us enjoy our hearings, sights, and powers
so long as You decide to keep us alive; and (please do) make it the inheritor of us.
And (please do) make us avenge ourselves against them who wrong us;
and back us against them who antagonize us;
and do not suffer misfortunes in affairs of our religion;

arabic text: وَلا تَجْعَلِ الدُّنْيَا أَكْبَرَ هَمِّنَا وَلا مَبْلَغَ عِلْمِنَا،
english translation text: and do not make our worldly affairs happen to be our greatest concern or our utmost knowledge;

arabic text: وَلا تُسَلِّطْ عَلَيْنَا مَنْ لا يَرْحَمُنَا،
english translation text: and do not set him who does not have mercy upon us, as master over us;
in the name of Your mercy; Oh the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: Oh Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
